chapter_title: Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
text:
(a) A continuance under Section 524.032 (Hearing Date; Rescheduling) stays the suspension of a driver’s license until the date of the final decision of the administrative law judge.

(b) A suspension order may not go into effect pending a final decision of the administrative law judge as a result of a continuance granted under Section 524.039 (Appearance of Technicians at Hearing) .

(c) Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 766 (H.B. 4528 ), Sec. 8, eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 524. Admin. Suspension of Driver's License for Failure to Pass Test for Intoxication
##### § 524.037 — Continuance

(a) A continuance under Section 524.032 (Hearing Date; Rescheduling) stays the suspension of a driver’s license until the date of the final decision of the administrative law judge.

(b) A suspension order may not go into effect pending a final decision of the administrative law judge as a result of a continuance granted under Section 524.039 (Appearance of Technicians at Hearing) .

(c) Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 766 (H.B. 4528 ), Sec. 8, eff. September 1, 2023.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 766 (H.B.4528), Sec. 8, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A suspension order may not go into effect pending a final decision of the administrative law judge as a result of a continuance granted under Section 524.039 (Appearance of Technicians at Hearing) .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 766 (H.B. 4528 ), Sec. 8, eff. September 1, 2023.
